narrative.narrative: Fear has tightened its grip as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 27, mirroring the extreme sentiment washout that marked the August 2024 bottom. Stablecoin growth continues to expand quietly in the background, suggesting dry powder is accumulating while MVRV Z-Score signals deep value territory. The market appears to be compressing toward a resolution that historically favors the patient.
narrative.headline: Fear Peaks as Smart Money Accumulates

consensus.key_reasoning: The Fear & Greed Index at 27 anchors the score in the Panic band (24-31), and the strong 80.7% pattern match to the August 2024 accumulation bottom with expanding stablecoin dry powder suggests a washout is in progress. However, divergent ETF flows, fading BTC dominance, and elevated funding indicate the flush is not yet clean, warranting caution rather than aggressive deployment.
disagreements_noted: Analyst calls Anxiety (39-46 band) while the Fear & Greed reading of 27 sits in Panic (24-31) — a one-rung adjustment was applied per the hard rule
Analyst flags ETF flows, VIX, BTC dominance fade, and funding as diverging factors that prevent a clean risk-on signal despite bullish bottom-matching pattern
Narrative writer leans more bullish (confidence 0.81) on accumulation framing while analyst stays defensive (confidence 0.62) with RISK_OFF regime
